name: Homespun Scalloped Potatoes #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the cream cheese, milk, salt, and pepper. Stir until smooth.
2. Add the potatoes and chives. Mix lightly.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish. Cover.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
5. Stir before serving. This recipe can be made ahead of time but should not be cooked. Instead, refrigerate it. When ready to serve, bake as directed.
